ad_q0: Q. Can I trust KSTAY listings?
ad_a1_0: We follow Korea's lodging rules with strict document checks.
ad_a2_0: Only verified, safe stays are listed.
ad_q1: Q. Why is KSTAY more affordable?
ad_a1_1: We cut excessive fees and remove platform markup.
ad_a2_1: Savings go to host service quality and guest prices.
ad_a1_2: We share local hidden spots with the world, grow with small businesses, and revive local economies.
